name: LEGO Classic Set
description: Denmark's greatest gift to the world — LEGO bricks invented in Billund in 1932. Perfect Danish souvenir and creative toy for all ages.

name: Georg Jensen Silver Jewellery
description: Iconic Danish silverware and jewellery brand founded in 1904. Represents Danish craftsmanship and minimalist design at its finest.

name: Royal Copenhagen Porcelain
description: Hand-painted Danish porcelain with distinctive blue floral patterns since 1775. A treasured Danish design classic and collector's item.

name: Hygge Book Collection
description: Explore the Danish art of hygge with bestselling books about Danish happiness, wellbeing and the cosy lifestyle philosophy.

name: Danish Butter Cookies (Royal Dansk)
description: The iconic blue tin of Danish butter cookies — the world's most recognisable Danish export. Crispy, buttery and impossibly addictive.

name: Scandinavian Design Coffee Table Book
description: Explore Danish and Scandinavian design heritage — from Arne Jacobsen's chairs to the principles of functional beauty.

name: Arne Jacobsen Egg Chair Replica
description: The famous Egg Chair designed by Arne Jacobsen in 1958 for Copenhagen's Radisson Blu Royal Hotel. An icon of mid-century modern design.

name: Viking History Books
description: Discover the real history of Denmark's Viking heritage — from raiding to trading, settlement and the sagas.
